name: Guard
summary: Brace for the enemy response and reduce incoming damage.
formula: The next enemy damage is halved after variance, with minimum 1 damage if the hit lands.
details: Guard is the defensive tempo action. It does not require an attack QTE, but the enemy still gets their turn.
The mitigation applies to the next incoming enemy hit only. Strong defense can still be beaten by a very good enemy result.
Guard is useful when you need SP, expect a dangerous enemy action, or want to stabilize before using another option.
